titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Morse College, Yale University, Records of the Master
Morse College, Yale University, Records of the Master
titlestmt.author: compiled by Michael Lotstein

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday November 5, 2020 at 08:30

did.unittitle: Morse College, Yale University, records of the master

odd.head: General
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 13-I-2 (YRG 13-I-2), Records of the master of Morse College.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Pierson College, Yale University, Records of the Master (RU 316). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of the administrative files and memorabilia of Stanton Wheeler, Master of Morse College from 1995-2001.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The title "Master" for chief executive officers of residential colleges was changed to "Head of College" in April of 2016.

did.unittitle: Records of Stanton Wheeler, Master of Morse College
